title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Big Bazaar

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Big Bazaar
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Big Bazaar! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Ghaziabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Big Bazaar:
Big Bazaar is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Big Bazaar!
